author: lOrm
content: Verified: no DenialTracker module exists in current src/ (grep -rn 'DenialTracker|denial_tracker' returns 0 matches). The earlier issue comment claiming it landed in src/permissions.rs under #571 attribution does NOT match the current tree — either it was reverted, never merged, or attributed elsewhere. The actual send_message tool remains blocked on #507 coordinator subsystem. Remaining gap: (1) DenialTracker module needs landing if it's wanted as a standalone newtype (PermissionManager's in-place counters in src/permissions.rs are still the only escalation surface); (2) send_message itself blocked on coordinator. Leaving open.
